title: Anew In Real Time
description: Adjust the time in the game to match the real life time.
body:
Adjust the time in the game to match the real life time, the time in the game will be affected to match reality so that 00:00 in the game will no longer be a sunrise, but will be almost midnight.

The reason why this mod comes out is to make up for the absence of a mod that synchronizes (real-time and minecraft-time).

The impact on performance should be negligible (if not almost zero) and if you remove the mod, your world should return to normal, but in case you have problems you can run "gamerule doDayLightCicle True" to restore the cycle (which is disabled for obvious reasons).
